titleStmt.title: SII 24.232: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 232. (A.R. No. 26 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Also records the sale of a garden-land by the officials of the shrine of the goddess Śrīraṅganāyakī to the same bhaṭṭas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
This and the following inscriptions are engraved one below the other.komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī kulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu varuṣam Iraṇṭāvatiṉetirāmāṇṭu makaranāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum cevvāykkiḻamai yum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil nācciyār śrī raṅkanāyakiyār koyilil śrī vaiṣṇavak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum mutaṟkaraṇattomum tirunantavaṉa nilavilai pramāṇam . perumāḷ cuntara pāṇṭiyatevar tirunāmattāl Ivvūril vaitta Akaram kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvetimaṅkalattu bha
ṭṭakaḷukku Iṟṟai nāḷāl viṟṟukkuṭutta tirunantavaṉamāvatu . tirukkuṟaip paṟṟil teṉṉoḻukil nācciyār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa tirunantavaṉattukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai tātanampimāril vaṇcaṭakopadāsanampi piḷantaḷaintā rāṉa koyil poṉmeynta perumāḷ dāsaṉ tirunantavaṉattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai maṉṟacca viḷākattu Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai tāta nampimāril piṟakuvāḷi Aḻakiyaperumāḷ dāsaṉ tirunantavaṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai tirumuṭikkuṟaikku perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruvi
tikkut teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa tirunantavaṉam mikutik kuṟai Uṭpaṭa maranilaiyum viḷai nilamum Uṭpaṭak kiḻ mel kol 6 nta Ittirunantavaṉam kol Āṟemukkā lukkum kol 1- kku ø10 5 Āka Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷaṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅku nallirāci ø100 1(1/4) Ippaṇam nūṟṟu Oṉṟekālum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaic celavaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom bhaṭṭakaḷukku nācciyār koyil śrīvaiṣṇavak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum mutaṟ karaṇattomum . Ippaṭi viṟṟuk kuṭutta Ittirunantavaṉaṅ kol Āṟe mukkālil meṉo
kkiṉa maramum kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟum bhāgamum bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟuk kuṭuttom . Ippaṭi viṟṟuk kuṭutta It tirunantavaṉam kol Āṟe mukkālukkum Ippaṇam nūṟṟu Oṉṟekālum vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷ celavolai yāvatākavum . Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavolai kāṭṭavum kāṇavum kaṭavatallavākavum . Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom bhaṭṭakaḷukku śrīvaiṣṇava
k kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum mutaṟkaraṇattomum Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ipramā ṇappaṭi mulliyamāṉa paṇam nūṟṟu Oṉṟe kālum bharatar pakkalile kaik koḷḷukaiyil Ituve kraya dravyac celavu kaiyyīṭāvatākavum . Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku naācciyār śrīraṅkanāyakiyār koyil śrīvaiṣṇavak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum mutaṟ karaṇattomum Ippaṇam nūṟṟu Oṉṟe kālukkum It tirunantavaṉam kol Āṟe mukkālum viṟṟukkuṭuttamaikku Ivai śrīvaiṣṇava dāsaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivar Apekṣikka Ipramāṇam
Eḻutiṉamaikku Ivai perumākkaḷur varatarāja bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi Aṟi veṉ śrīvaikunta dāsaṉeṉ §
Digital edition of SII 24.232 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
